programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo 911

programme.title: Airplane Repo: No Rescue Repo
programme.desc: Super Repo Man Mike Kennedy boldly risks an emergency landing on a remote Alaskan glacier, while strongman Danny Thompson frees a $1.8-million Lear 31 from its hangar by hand.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Josh to the Future
programme.desc: Josh Gates is back (to the future) with his co-star from Expedition: Back to the Future, Christopher Lloyd, The Office's Craig Robinson, Tiffany Beers who created the real-life self-lacing sneakers and a field trip that leads to time travel.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 1
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 2
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Methane Meltdown
programme.desc: The Raneys have a challenge on their hands as they try to restore a couple's failed homestead in Ohio. Marty's only hope is an old gas well, which if he can get working, can breathe life back into the homestead.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Ice Mine Cometh
programme.desc: Winter has come along with the thinnest, most unpredictable ice in decades. After three years, Shawn returns to diving under the ice in pursuit of the Tomcod claim. Kris tries to set up and mine in one day. Emily's dependable Claim 14 shocks her.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Frozen Chokehold
programme.desc: Only days into the winter mining season, a regulator freeze up cuts off Shawn's air supply. Emily negotiates with Mr. Gold for season-saving coordinates. Vernon returns to the ice with an eye to buy Claim 16. The Kellys get on some gold.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Snow Blind
programme.desc: The clock ticks as an impending, violent arctic storm the Siberian Express gathers strength. Shawn can't quit the gold. Kris gambles on another rookie miner. Emily finds gold but her equipment fails. Vernon risks everything to test Claim 16.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Pain in the Ice
programme.desc: Following the arctic storm that drove everyone to shore, Shawn embarks on a marathon dive, Kris unveils a diving relay with The Reaper's new diver Shaunna, and Emily takes another desperate shot at TOMCOD gold.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Total Meltdown
programme.desc: Suffering the icy burn of possible defeat, Kris wrecks his 3-diver relay plan and abandons his crew. Shawn is forced to question TOMCOD. Emily returns home to Claim 14. Vernon gambles on the edge of the ice.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Cold Man and the Sea
programme.desc: The clock ticks as Shawn races to prove the viability of the TOMCOD. Kris makes amends with his crew and Brad dives for the first time in five years, saving the day with a surprise. Back on Claim 14, Emily tries to break her ice season curse.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Freezer Burn
programme.desc: When the temperature plummets to a season low, Shawn fights frozen ground with steam heat. Kris' hot plan to beat the cold fizzles quickly. Vernon gambles on a new spot.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Up in Flames
programme.desc: As an arctic blizzard wreaks havoc across Nome, Kris finds gold under the ice but fire erupts overhead. Shawn struggles to rescue his operation. Emily risks it all on a double dive and Vernon leans on a diver making her comeback.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Do or Die
programme.desc: Recovering from COVID-19, Tammy now needs constant oxygen, and her weight spirals. Chris faces his final weigh-in, and Amy makes a big decision about her future. With Tammy's romance heating up, the family takes matters into their own hands.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Destinee's Story
programme.desc: Born as 'Matthew', Destinee never felt like she fit in. Now, having come out as a 600-pound transgender woman, she likes her curves, but she will need to say goodbye to them if she wants to be approved to transition completely.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Angie J - Part 1- Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Right when Angie starts to succeed in Dr. Now's program, her marriage falls apart and her life is thrown into chaos. Angie moves ahead despite dire difficulties, but when her body starts to break down, Angie fears the worst ... and faces it alone.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Kenae's Journey
programme.desc: Kenae' was already big before her weight gain took off after the death of her beloved mother. Refusing to deal with the pain, Kenae' turned to food to fill the void. But she'll be reunited with her mom soon if the denial continues.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Angie J - Part 1- Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Right when Angie starts to succeed in Dr. Now's program, her marriage falls apart and her life is thrown into chaos. Angie moves ahead despite dire difficulties, but when her body starts to break down, Angie fears the worst ... and faces it alone.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Kenae's Journey
programme.desc: Kenae' was already big before her weight gain took off after the death of her beloved mother. Refusing to deal with the pain, Kenae' turned to food to fill the void. But she'll be reunited with her mom soon if the denial continues.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Being Strong or Being a Bitch
programme.desc: Janelle gathers Kody and the wives to talk about their increasingly tense family dynamic. Kody gets honest and says he doesn't want to advocate for polygamy anymore, and Robyn and Christine open up about their own insecurities as they question everything.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Felons No More
programme.desc: The Browns visit their polygamist friends to discuss the sudden and exciting possibility that polygamy will be decriminalized in Utah. The car trip to get there is a mess, but once there, the excitement is palpable.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Coronavirus Crisis
programme.desc: Coronavirus has hit the Waldrops hard. School and sports are on hold, and Courtney's parents can no longer provide much-needed help during the day. In addition, Eric stops construction on the remodel as the family faces an uncertain financial future.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Survival Mode
programme.desc: After years of renovations, the Waldrops finally move into their new home. School is starting for the boys, and fears of COVID-19 lead Courtney and Eric to consider homeschooling. They also decide to send the sextuplets to a speech pathologist.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: There's a Shark in the Salon!
programme.desc: It's sink or swim for Randy when Shark Tank's Barbara Corcoran comes to Kleinfeld. Bride Bridgette needs a dress she can run in. Her wedding ceremony is taking place during a half marathon in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm the Bride, Leave Some Space!
programme.desc: Nikki is looking for a fun, party-ready dress for her wild New Year's Eve wedding. Bride Natalie dreams of a finding a ball gown so massive that wedding guests will struggle to get close to her and someone could even 'hide' underneath it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Did I Hear Someone Say $16,000?
programme.desc: Randy's day is nonstop as he assists brides and auditions models for his runway show. Bride Emanuela wants a sexy ball gown and she's not afraid to throw her dad's budget out the window. Marlena is finally dress shopping for a wedding years in the making.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That's How You Dress a Lady
programme.desc: Randy's runway show is finally here and it's his big opportunity to prove he's back as a bridal designer for good.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Seven People With Seven Opinions
programme.desc: Super fan TK brings seven of her closest friends to help her choose her dress. Actress Leslie has an unlimited budget, but she refuses to believe her opinionated mom chose the perfect wedding gown on the very first try.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: 14 and Looking for Mr. Right
programme.desc: Priscilla, a 14-year-old Gypsy girl, is a fully trained Gypsy wife who is looking for a husband.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Showdown at the Altar
programme.desc: Star-crossed lovers, Heath and Alyssa, defy both sets of parents to have their dream wedding, but Heath's aunt is prepared to use excessive violence to stop them from becoming man and wife.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: All Bets Are Off
programme.desc: A young groom plans an extravagant, gypsy-style wedding for his fiancée in Vegas, but their love is tested when he spends their first night in town living it up.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Love Is a Battlefield
programme.desc: Four gypsy teens looking for love prepare for the biggest Romanichal ball of the year.

programme.title: Deliciousness: Needing the Dough
programme.desc: Angela Kinsey, Kel Mitchell, and Tim Chantarangsu join Tiffani Thiessen to talk about getting drunk and doing some 'Ekshershize', the wonder of bread in 'Needing the Dough', and every kid's favorite holiday in 'Candy Season'.

programme.title: Deliciousness: All-Night Diners
programme.desc: Angela Kinsey, Kel Mitchell, and Tim Chantarangsu join Tiffani Thiessen to check out some wild 'All-Night Diners', witness 'Hot Messes' and discuss how long is too long to 'Save it for Later'.

programme.title: Deliciousness: Better with Bacon
programme.desc: Angela Kinsey, Kel Mitchell, and Tim Chantarangsu join Tiffani Thiessen to pronounce that everything is 'Better with Bacon', to talk about kids' love of 'Pasghetti', and to play a game of 'Chug-Off'.

programme.title: Deliciousness: Dish Duty

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Circumstances
programme.desc: It was an unthinkable crime. Brittany Eldridge was nearly nine months pregnant when she was found dead in her apartment. Investigators focused on two men believing both had a possible motive but were they capable of murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Lynn Friend was a devoted mother with wedding plans when she vanished. The question was whether she was a runaway bride, or if she ran into trouble. Investigators searched land and sea, going to unexpected depths to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Unholy Secrets
programme.desc: A pastor places a frantic 911 call, pleading for help to save his fiancée who he says just shot herself. As investigators follow the unravelling truth, and look closer at the crime scene, a darker side to this happy relationship stuns everyone.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Dark Echoes

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Crack in Everything

programme.desc: Debbie Puglisi is enjoying life with her husband of nearly 25 years, Nino, in their new dream home. But when an unexpected visitor drops by the neighborhood, Debbie's whole world becomes her worst nightmare in a matter of minutes.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: If the Walls Could Talk
programme.desc: A quiet affluent retirement community in Monroe, Ohio is baffled when Barbara Howe simply vanishes one night. The police soon find her body in the trunk of her car, her throat slit. The hunt for her killer takes them back to an unlikely source.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Can't Let Go
programme.desc: When 18-year-old Misty falls in love with a man nearly 15 years her senior, Misty's parents warn against the relationship. But no one could predict the danger Misty is in, or how this man will change all their lives forever.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Killer on the Roof
programme.desc: A former marine is gunned down in bed, and detectives believe the shots were fired from the roof outside his second-story window. When the investigators' focus turns to the victim's workplace, furious colleagues and scorned exes litter the suspect list.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bloodland
programme.desc: A young family buys a rural piece of paradise. Still, the gate on their land that prevents neighbours from accessing their property soon becomes an angry, ultimately fatal, bone of contention.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Said I Killed My Brother
programme.desc: Eric Nance expects his sister Belinda to find and destroy his murder weapon to protect him. When she finally locates it, Belinda is torn between family loyalty and doing what she knows is right. Her choice will either shield him from police or betray him.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Killer on the Roof
programme.desc: A former marine is gunned down in bed, and detectives believe the shots were fired from the roof outside his second-story window. When the investigators' focus turns to the victim's workplace, furious colleagues and scorned exes litter the suspect list.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bloodland
programme.desc: A young family buys a rural piece of paradise. Still, the gate on their land that prevents neighbours from accessing their property soon becomes an angry, ultimately fatal, bone of contention.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Something Wasn't Right
programme.desc: Beverly Stephens knew something wasn't right with her husband, Reginald Brooks, but never thought there was a killer inside him.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Salon Stalker
programme.desc: When Idaho hairdresser Makaela Zabel-Gravatt begins cutting the hair of truck driver Christopher Wirfs, little does she realize that it signals the start of a two-year long nightmare that will end in the most heart-stopping and disturbing way.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Pipe Nightmare
programme.desc: Barry Hornstein accidentally detonates a pipe bomb in his own driveway when he kicks a mysterious package. Suddenly, an online terror campaign against his 17-year old son ensues, leading police to wonder who wants to hurt the Hornsteins, and why?

programme.title: Web of Lies: Hate Mail
programme.desc: Shortly after Chris Coleman starts a new job as Security Chief for a Christian ministry, he begins receiving threatening emails. Then, tragedy strikes: his wife and two sons are found dead. Police must work to trace the emails back to the killer.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Grounds for Murder
programme.desc: Two women disappear from an elite college town. Panic pervades the community when their bodies are found.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Natalee Holloway: Lost in Paradise
programme.desc: The daughter of a Peruvian political candidate disappears after a night out in Lima, Peru. The man she was last seen alive with is linked to the disappearance of young American woman 3,000 miles away.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: The Gentleman Killer
programme.desc: Bronx, NY, 1941: When tea for two becomes a murder of one, investigators from all across New York City must act upon the testimony of a few brave women to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Lock Up Your Daughters
programme.desc: Gaffney, SC, 1968: When a local reporter receives a mysterious phone call from a murderer who threatens to kill again, Gaffney police must race against the clock to try to save the town's teen girls.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Follow the Money
programme.desc: The body of a 72-year-old man is found in junkyard, stabbed 13 times and wearing nothing but his underwear and dentures. When investigators discover a trail of purchases made with the victim's credit card, they hope it will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My Mysteries: Crazy Eyes
Homicide Hunter: My, My Mysteries: Runaway Red
20/20 on ID: The Killer Clown?
programme.desc: A bizarre murder shocks a wealthy community when a person dressed like a clown guns down a woman at her front door. Suspicion falls on the victim's husband and his alleged girlfriend, but it would take over twenty years until an arrest is finally made.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Hearts on Fire
programme.desc: Billy Frietag is a free-spirited young man who spends the warmer months working the family fruit and vegetable farm, and travels when it's cold. Tragically, it's his openness and generosity that lead to strange set of events which culminate in his death.

programme.title: Shattered: The Pact
programme.desc: In 1990, a teenage boy vanishes. Nearly two decades later, there's still no trace of him, dead or alive. It's a mother's worst nightmare, but one detective refuses to stop looking until he's able to solve this mystery.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Open 24 Hours
programme.desc: To pay for college, Donna Ferres takes a job working the overnight shift at a local convenience store. But after a familiar face walks into the store one night, her routine shift takes a sick and twisted turn.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Lies
programme.desc: In 2015, Detective Scott Sanderson finds himself solving one of the strangest cases of his career. At its center are a newborn and her missing mother. Before long he'll uncover a diabolical scheme that will destroy the lives of everyone it touches.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Cold War Files
programme.desc: Reinhard Gehlen was the head of Nazi Germany's intelligence operation against the Soviets. That made him invaluable to the West during the Cold War but he could have told his new allies what they wanted to hear and fuelled the arms race.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Nazi King
programme.desc: The British Royal Family may have changed its name from Saxe-Coburg-Gotha to Windsor but some believe they didn't lose their allegiance to Germany. Was Edward VIII a Nazi sympathizer? Did his brother try to negotiate peace with Germany?

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Death of Hitler
programme.desc: History tells us that Adolf Hitler committed suicide in his bunker in Berlin. However, some dissenting voices disagree.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.desc: The British Royal Family may have changed its name from Saxe-Coburg-Gotha to Windsor but some believe they didn't lose their allegiance to Germany. Was Edward VIII a Nazi sympathizer? Did his brother try to negotiate peace with Germany?

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Wild Bill: Marskman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own, by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: From the ashes of the Confederacy rises a bold rebel outlaw determined to get rich and get even. Jesse James is seen by many as a modern day Robin Hood, a Southern gentleman avenging the efforts of Northern businessmen to exploit his territory.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Living La Vida Lakeside
programme.desc: After 14 years of dreaming, a Lake Jackson, Texas, family is finally building their custom home on a piece of land around Pecan Lake. Located on a peninsula, the backyard leaves the ideal space to build a one-of-a-kind vanishing edge pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ranch Pool Resort
programme.desc: Three generations living together on a family ranch in Austin, Texas, are ready to upgrade their old, outdated pool with a large sun shelf, a spa and a waterfall with jumping rocks.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Slidin' Into Home
programme.desc: A Texas family returns to their home state of North Carolina and wants to add a pool to their 70-acre property. The kings design a pool packed with fun features including a custom slide, a waterfall and an outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Bluey: Easter/ Barky Boats/ Escape
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: To Serve and Protect/ Kickin' It Old School
programme.desc: Simon is ecstatic when he's elected the school's safety monitor, but when Alvin goofs off at school, Simon has to choose between doing the right thing or giving Alvin detention. Dave takes away the Chipmunks technology.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mystic Mountain/ Candy Confessions
programme.desc: Dave is concerned that the Chipmunks have become too obsessed with their latest video game. Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him a limited edition skateboard. But, Theodore uses the money to buy candy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mojo Missing/ Who's the Animal
programme.desc: Alvin is convinced his mojo was in a cap he gave to a fan, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert. During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for the real Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: Movie: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria attempt to leave Madagascar but wind up landing in Africa. Alex meets his family but struggles to communicate with them due to his easy life in the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: What's Love Gato Do With It/ Dial M. for Mustard
programme.desc: After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it. Ronnie Anne and friends try to uncover what happened to Bruno's hot dog cart.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Going Overboard/ Walk Don't Run
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne finds out Tio Carlos was a famous skateboarder and gets him to teach her some moves. And, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business to buy a new skateboard.

programme.title: The Loud House: Kick the Bucket List/ Party Down
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde's spring break plans are jeopardized when they only have one day to complete their list. Lori throws a sophisticated party, but it backfires when her guests don't like what she's planned.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fed Up/ Shell Shock
programme.desc: The kids make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza. Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby, but Lincoln doesn't trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: The Loud House: Future Tense/ Lynner Takes All
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family, they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: The Loud House: Back Out There/ Spell It Out
programme.desc: Clyde, worried that Lincoln is hung up on Ronnie Anne, tries to cure his post-breakup blues.Tired of her siblings walking all over her, Lucy turns to a spell book once to teach her siblings a lesson.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: The group arrives at the witch’s castle for an epic battle of swords and spells, and a surprise admission from Stacey that shocks her father.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Good Neighbors/ Skill Crane
programme.desc: Squidward obsesses over winning a stuffed animal; Squid's security system backfires.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sailor Mouth/ Artist Unknown
programme.desc: Bob learns a 'bad' word off of a dumpster; Bob is Squid's only student for an art class.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wet Painters/ Krusty Krab Training Video
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has SpongeBob and Patrick paint the inside of his house; training for employees.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to assist Squidward with the annual talent show; Plankton is lonely.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dying for Pie/ Imitation Krabs
programme.desc: Squidward lets Bob eat an exploding pie; Plankton disguises himself as Mr. Krabs.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krab Borg/ Rock a Bye Bi-Valve
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes paranoid; Patrick finds a baby clam and decides to rear it as his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Suctioncup Symphony
programme.desc: The Bikini Bottom Symphony is accepting submissions for their composition contest, and Squidward is determined to win.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Born Again Krabs/ Safety Freak SpongeBob
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs refuses to let SpongeBob throw away a mouldy Krabby Patty under the grill.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Keep Bikini Bottom Beautiful/ A Pal for Gary
programme.desc: Squidward cleans up the city of Bikini Bottom with 'help' from SpongeBob. SpongeBob brings Gary a pet that terrorizes him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob Meets the Strangler/ Pranks a Lot
programme.desc: SpongeBob turns in the littering Tattletale Strangler; SpongeBob and Patrick invest in a local prank shop's magic 'invisible spray'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Restraining SpongeBob/ Fiasco
programme.desc: Annoyed by Spongebob for the last time, Squidward issues him a restraining order. Plankton steals a Krabby Patty from the Krusty Krab unaware it's really an art piece by famous artist Fiasco.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chimps Ahoy/ Ghost House
programme.desc: The Chimpanzee beneficiaries of Sandy's undersea tree dome are paying a visit to see what progress she has made with her inventions. The Flying Dutchman takes up residence at SpongeBob's house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Play's the Thing/ Rodeo Daze
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs opens a diner. SpongeBob takes his pals to Texas to see Sandy in a squirrel rodeo.

programme.title: The Loud House: Potty Mouth/ 'L' Is for Love
programme.desc: When the kids hear Lily curse, they're worried they have been a bad influence on her. A love letter addressed to 'L' Loud shows up at the house and the family has to figure out who it was meant for.

programme.title: The Loud House: Picture Perfect/ Undie Pressure
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the "perfect" family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: The Loud House: Change of Heart/ Health Kicked
programme.desc: Clyde, desperate to learn how to act normal around Lori, enlists Leni's help. Worried that Mom and Dad are hurting their health from not being active, the kids encourage them to exercise.

programme.title: The Loud House: Yes Man/ Friend or Faux
programme.desc: The sisters ask Lincoln to teach them how to ask Mom and Dad for money. Lisa gets her report card and finds she failed social skills and must make a friend to get her grade up.

programme.title: The Loud House: Tripped!
programme.desc: Everyone in the family has been working hard to save up for a family vacation. But while road tripping to their destination, everything that can go for the family wrong does.

programme.title: The Loud House: City Slickers/ Fool Me Twice
programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city. Lori struggles to be a city girl and Lincoln finds Ronnie Anne has changed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Missing Identity/ Plankton's Army
programme.desc: SpongeBob loses his nametag; Plankton is after the Krabby Patty Secret Formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spy Buddies/ Boat Smarts/ Good 'Ol What's-His-Name
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick spy on Plankton; SpongeBob makes an instructional boating video.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Safety Third/ Mister Manners
programme.desc: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him a replica of the car. Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the Princess of England.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pizza Dash/ Glory Days
programme.desc: The town is under attack when Simon creates a drone that can not only deliver pizzas but has the ability to learn.Alvin worries the munks are responsible for making Dave boring when they find out he used to be a rock star.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Going Green/ Tattle Tail
programme.desc: Jeanette signs the Chipmunks and Chipettes up for a green living competition. Alvin likes a girl at school so he agrees to look after her talking bird, but he's nervous about the bird blabbing when he says something damaging.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Kiss Conspiracy/ House Guest
programme.desc: Simon is too embarrassed to kiss his co-star in the school play. So in a moment of desperation, he agrees to allow Alvin to switch identities with him. Alvin secretly decides to rent out their house for a Hawaiian home-swap.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: The group arrives at the witch’s castle for an epic battle of swords and spells, and a surprise admission from Stacey that shocks her father.

programme.title: Movie: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria attempt to leave Madagascar but wind up landing in Africa. Alex meets his family but struggles to communicate with them due to his easy life in the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Danger Force: Prank War
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: No Egrets/ Meal Ticket
programme.desc: Sergio is in for a treat when a group of baby birds think he’s their mama. Ronnie Anne and Sid help Casey run his family food truck… at the Yoon Kwan concert.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fast Feud/ Never Friending Story
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid try to take down the obnoxious burger restaurant that opened up across the street. After picking Par as his new best friend, Bobby realizes he may be in over his head.

programme.title: The Loud House: Kick the Bucket List/ Party Down
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde's spring break plans are jeopardized when they only have one day to complete their list. Lori throws a sophisticated party, but it backfires when her guests don't like what she's planned.

programme.title: The Loud House: Future Tense/ Lynner Takes All
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family, they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Great Indoors/ Canderemy
programme.desc: Bad weather spoils Isabella's plan to earn a Fireside Girl patch, so Phineas and Ferb build a huge bio-dome to help her. Then, while Candace is visiting Jeremy, they are zapped by Dr. Doofenshmirtz's 'combine-inator,' literally joining them at the hip.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Life and Crimes of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Scrooge’s enemies reveal a secret history to prove that Scrooge is responsible for turning them evil, forcing Louie to defend his uncle against their prosecutor: Doofus Drake.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Living Mummies of Toth-Ra
programme.desc: In a lost pyramid, Louie interprets a pharaoh's prophecy to his advantage, forcing Scrooge and Launchpad to convince a group of living mummies to rescue him.

programme.title: DuckTales: Sky Pirates...In the Sky!
programme.desc: Tired of being ignored by his family, Dewey’s search for attention goes too far when he falls in with flamboyant Don Karnage and his cutthroat gang of Singing Sky Pirates.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Raging Bully/ Lights, Candace, Action!
programme.desc: Phineas is challenged to a duel by the local bully and enters the ring for a thumb wrestling competition. Then Candace gets her chance at fame until Phineas and Ferb enter as directors.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry Lays an Egg/ Gaming the System
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an egg, which they believe belongs to Perry, so they build a mechanical contraption to care for it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Attack of the 50 Foot Sister/ Backyard Aquarium
programme.desc: The boys create a PhineasandFerbalizer to speed up the growing process of vegetables.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Parker Gets Toasty
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: The Owl House: Enchanting Grom Fright
programme.desc: Luz experiences Grom, Hexside's version of prom, and it's not what she expects.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Interrupted/ A Real Boy
programme.desc: Candace spends the day with her mom in the backyard so that she can bust her brothers. Then, Dr. Doofenshmirtz thinks Vanessa overhears him say he would rather have a son, so he zaps her with the Forget-About-It Ray.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Invasion of the Ferb Snatchers/ Ain't No Kiddie Ride
programme.desc: After an all night science-fiction movie marathon, Candace is convinced that Ferb is an alien and gathers evidence to prove it. The boys admit that they are doing something for an alien but that Ferb is not one.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium/ Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Present Tense/ Hurt Bike
programme.desc: Cricket struggles to get the best birthday present for his best friend, Remy. After almost getting in a dirt bike accident, Cricket decides to live his life in shelter.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Quiet Please/ Chipwrecked
programme.desc: When the Greens visit the library, the librarian threatens to throw them out if they make a sound. Chip Whistler attempts to make Cricket lose his job by running Big Coffee out of business.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Night Drivers/ Return to Wartwood
programme.desc: Ignoring Anne's and Hop Pop's warnings about the dangers of night driving, Sprig and Polly stay up all night to drive the family home. Then, The Plantar's come up with a plan after learning they forgot to bring gifts.

programme.title: DuckTales: Let's Get Dangerous!
programme.desc: Darkwing gains an unlikely sidekick as he uncovers a dark conspiracy tied to the Missing Mysteries and one of Scrooge's employees.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Split Sword of Swanstantine!
programme.desc: The kids pair off to find the missing pieces of a mystical sword hidden throughout an Istanboar marketplace, unless F.O.W.L. gets to them first.

programme.title: DuckTales: New Gods on the Block!
programme.desc: The kids try to prove themselves by auditioning to take Zeus’ place amongst the Greek gods, while Storkules interferes with Donald and Daisy’s date.

programme.title: DuckTales: The First Adventure!
programme.desc: Scrooge is forced to babysit young Donald and Della as they go on their first adventure to find a powerful artifact, unaware that Bradford is taking on this mission personally.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Fight for Castle McDuck!
programme.desc: A bitter feud between Scrooge and his sister spreads to the rest of the family as Phantom Blot attempts to steal a priceless artifact and destroy Castle McDuck once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beaks in the Shell!
programme.desc: Huey struggles to keep Fenton and Gandra’s top secret experiment (and their relationship) hidden from the world. Mark Beaks is desperate for one last gizmo to steal.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Cargo of Kit Cloudkicker!
programme.desc: Della, Dewey, and Huey recruit a showboating pilot to take them to an island full of monsters in search of a Missing Mystery, unaware that Don Karange is hot on their tails.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Life and Crimes of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Scrooge’s enemies reveal a secret history to prove that Scrooge is responsible for turning them evil, forcing Louie to defend his uncle against their prosecutor: Doofus Drake.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Adventure!
programme.desc: The future of adventuring hangs in the balance as the Duck family uncovers earth-shattering secrets in a final standoff with the Fiendish Organization for World Larceny (F.O.W.L.).

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Persistence! Kolossal Strike!
Phineas and Ferb: The Baljeatles/ Vanessassary Roughness
programme.desc: Baljeet signs up for rock camp and Vanessa tries to convince her dad she is responsible.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mommy Can You Hear Me?/ Road Trip
programme.desc: After Candace injures her ankle and is told to stay in bed, Phineas and Ferb provide her with a box of items to stave off her boredom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Monster From Id/ Gi-Ants
programme.desc: After losing a gift that Jeremy made for her, Candace is determined to recreate it before he realizes it's missing. Candace can't remember what it looks like, and has Phineas and Ferb use their mind machine to recapture her memory of it.

programme.desc: Mike wants the family to join a country club, while newly retired George tries to find a new hobby.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Night Owl
programme.desc: While working at a sobriety checkpoint, Burgess finds a duffle bag full of heroin in the truck of a respected college professor who claims to know nothing about how the drugs ended up there.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Cases That Need to Be Solved
programme.desc: When a young boy is executed, Intelligence turns to the boy's parents for information. Upon further investigation, they discover the boy's father has a criminal background and was part of a local gang.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forty-Caliber Bread Crumb
programme.desc: While out on a bank run for his off-duty security job, Halstead and his co-workers find themselves under attack by a violent robbery crew which quickly becomes a full-scale shoot-out.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Kasual With a K
programme.desc: While responding to a call of shots fired, Voight, Antonio and Halstead come across a secret battered women's shelter and discover the owner has been wounded.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: If We Were Normal
programme.desc: When a call comes in about a woman stabbing a man then fleeing the scene, Burgess and Lindsay go investigate and find a young woman with the weapon in her hand.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: In a Duffle Bag
programme.desc: Voight responds to a call about a suspicious duffle bag, and uncovers a frigid newborn baby. Determined to find the culprit who abandoned the infant, Intelligence receives a promising lead based on information provided by Chicago Med.

programme.title: Movie: White House Down
programme.desc: A man recently denied his dream job of protecting the President of the United States ironically finds himself in the middle of chaos as he struggles to save his daughter, the president and the rest of the country.

programme.title: Movie: London Has Fallen
programme.desc: Mike Banning uncovers a plot to assassinate the leaders of the world during the Prime Minister's funeral in London.

programme.title: Family Guy: Island Adventure
programme.desc: In search of Stewie's cherished big wheel tricycle, that Peter threw out, Stewie and Brian embark on an adventure to 'Garbage Island,' a giant floating mass of trash out in the sea. Meanwhile, Lois tries to help Quagmire elevate his dating game.

programme.title: Family Guy: Throw It Away
programme.desc: After Lois reads a new book on the joys of decluttering, she challenges the rest of the Griffins to throw anything out of the house that does not spark joy. While all starts out well, Lois soon takes the decluttering to a surprising extreme.

programme.title: Family Guy: Girl, Internetted
programme.desc: When Meg suddenly becomes internet famous, she and an excited Peter work together to build her following and create content for her new image that revolves around unhealthy eating.

programme.title: Family Guy: Adam West High
programme.desc: When Brian's proposition to rename Quahog's high school 'Adam West High,' to honour the late Mayor West, is successful, he feels encouraged to run for office as Quahog's new mayor. The race takes a turn when Quagmire campaigns against Brian.

programme.title: Family Guy: Yacht Rocky
programme.desc: When the brewery announces it will be firing one employee, Peter is nervous he will be the one let go. In order to calm his nerves, the family departs on a Yacht Rock cruise that doesn’t go as expected.

programme.title: Family Guy: Bri-Da
programme.desc: Peter and his friends are sick of forgetting the million-dollar business ideas they come up with while drinking, so they strap on Joe's police body cams to record their every move.

programme.title: Family Guy: Absolutely Babulous
programme.desc: When Stewie receives a participation medal in his school's toddler games, he begins to question everything he has ever won. Meanwhile, Peter causes a fight between Lois' parents and must repair the damage he caused.

programme.title: Family Guy: Disney's the Reboot
programme.desc: In a special meta episode of 'Family Guy,' the network decides that it's time to explore some unique ways to reboot the series. When three versions of the reboots are shown to a focus group, the feedback takes some surprising turns.

programme.title: Family Guy: Cat Fight
programme.desc: When Quagmire opens a cat café in town, Brian decides to take a stand to get the café shut down. Meanwhile, when Meg and Brian get in trouble at school, Lois becomes nervous and decides they need to go to church camp in order to find their way.

programme.title: Family Guy: Peter and Lois' Wedding
programme.desc: The Wi-Fi goes out in the Griffin house, leaving the family with nothing to do for the evening. In order to keep the family entertained, Peter and Lois decide to tell the kids the story of how they met and fell in love in the '90s.

programme.title: Family Guy: Heart Burn
programme.desc: In celebration of Peter and Lois' anniversary, the Griffins recount their own versions of three well-known love stories.

programme.title: Family Guy: Shanksgiving
programme.desc: When Lois hosts a special Thanksgiving dinner for her family, Peter decides the best way to avoid it is to get arrested. Meanwhile, a secret that Stewie has been keeping from everyone is revealed.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A magazine program featuring current events as seen from a Christian perspective, as well as testimonies of changed lives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Springfield Up
programme.desc: A documentary filmmaker offers an inside look at his work chronicling the growth and development of some of Springfield's finest. Marge puts her photojournalism dream on hold in order to support Homer as he tries out odd jobs in search of success.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Yokel Chords
programme.desc: When Lisa protests denying education to Cletus's children, Principal Skinner offers her a chance to tutor the kids herself. Lisa's plans to help are diverted when Krusty spots the kids during their field trip and decides to use them as a musical act.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Rome-Old and Julie-Eh
programme.desc: When Homer incorrectly files for bankruptcy, the court appoints an accountant for him. Grampa and Selma fall in love and move in together, and Homer and Patty plot to break up their love connection.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homerazzi
programme.desc: Marge is inspired to purchase a fireproof safe to protect the family's most precious valuables after a candle on Homer's birthday cake sets fire to his party hat. A freak accident causes the safe to explode, forcing Marge to restage the family's photos.

programme.title: The Middle: Hungry Games
programme.desc: Excited and hungry over receiving a squatter's coupon at an all-you-can-eat buffet, the Hecks head off to church with the intent of hitting the restaurant immediately after the service.

programme.title: Movie: Divergent
programme.desc: In a dystopian future, a young woman who doesn't fit into any one faction of society finds her life threatened when she learns of a conspiracy to do away with her kind.

programme.title: Movie: Insurgent
programme.desc: In the wake of the uprising, Tris Prior finds herself on the run, along with Four, as they flee the leaders of the Erudite faction. They search for answers as they try to figure out what it was that Tris' loved ones sacrificed their lives to protect.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: In the future, the Capitol selects a boy and a girl from the twelve districts to fight to the death on television. Katniss volunteers to take her sister's place for the latest match.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After unwittingly starting a rebellion against the Capitol with their actions in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss and Peeta have large targets on their backs.

programme.title: Bones: The Daredevil in the Mold
programme.desc: A BMX rider's remains are discovered on the roof of a warehouse after a failed attempt to complete a bike stunt. Meanwhile, Sweets turns to Booth for advice about proposing to Daisy.

programme.title: Bones: The Bikini in the Soup
programme.desc: When the liquefied remains of a wedding planner are found in her home tanning bed on Valentine's Day, Cam pressures her team to solve the case in time for her to celebrate the holiday with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Bones: The Killer in the Crosshairs
programme.desc: After notoriously murdering The Gravedigger, sniper-on-the-loose Jacob Broadsky strikes again. This time, his victim is a prior suspect who escaped the justice system. Booth must use his own military training to beat the sniper at his own game.

programme.title: Movie: The Meg
programme.desc: After a research vessel is attacked, a prehistoric shark that was believed to be long-since extinct is found living in the ocean's deepest depths, and as it emerges to shallower waters a rescue diver who encountered it years prior must stop it.

programme.title: Movie: The Meg
programme.desc: After a research vessel is attacked, a prehistoric shark that was believed to be long-since extinct is found living in the ocean's deepest depths, and as it emerges to shallower waters a rescue diver who encountered it years prior must stop it.

programme.title: Arrow: City of Blood
programme.desc: After Slade threatens to take everything Oliver loves away, Oliver decides the fastest way to stop further bloodshed is to surrender to his enemy.

programme.title: Arrow: Streets of Fire
programme.desc: Oliver rallies his team as Slade's soldiers attack the city. Felicity gets a call from S.T.A.R. Labs with game-changing news, and Thea comes face-to-face with her father.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Identity Crisis
programme.desc: Sebastian receives a plea for help from his high school friend after her business partner is killed at the Crescent City Gaming Convention. Also, a FBI special agent believes Adrian is a hacker the Cyber Crimes division has been tracking for years.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: A petty officer's murder leads the team to a family-owned night club where Pride's mother used to perform weekly. Also, Lasalle must urgently return home to Alabama after receiving an unexpected call from his family.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: A New Dawn
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a petty officer who was in town to help a refugee family being recruited by terrorists. Also, Wade works on the special election campaign for Mayor Zahra Taylor that takes place during Mardi Gras.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Return of the King
programme.desc: After thousands of classified government files are stolen, the team searches for an underground group of hackers co-founded by Pride's old contact, Elvis Bertrand. Also, Sebastian joins the team as a newly minted NCIS Special Agent.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Agents McGee and Torres travel to New Orleans to partner with Pride and his team in the search for a missing homeland security theoretical terror playbook.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: End of the Line
programme.desc: A gruesome copycat murder on a street car reopens a former case for Wade, evoking painful memories from her past.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Last Stand
programme.desc: Pride's long-time friend, state and military attorney asks NCIS to investigate the disappearance of a JAG lawyer who specializes in classified cases and volunteers at a private military academy.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Swift, Silent, Deadly
programme.desc: A highly credentialed and skilled Special Ops Marine sends Pride and the team on a city-wide manhunt after he assaults six men in a bar.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Slay the Dragon
programme.desc: Tammy is reunited with her ex-husband, who disappeared after embezzling $80 million in Katrina relief funds, after he is linked to the murder of a crime boss' son.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Quid Pro Quo
programme.desc: While investigating a deadly accident at a naval base, the NCIS team finds out a unit of Seabees was poisoned with a contagious supervirus. Also, during an autopsy, Wade is infected with the virus and given hours to live if an antidote can't be found.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: NOLA Confidential
programme.desc: After the NCIS team uncovers a link between a drug ring and the New Orleans Police Department, Lasalle must investigate his former partner in the Vice unit. Also, Pride worries about Rita's safety as she looks into illegal activity in Clearwater.

programme.title: Movie: Man of Steel
programme.desc: A young man with extraordinary powers must confront his alien heritage when outcast members of his race invade Earth to claim it as their new home.

programme.title: Movie: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: After a First World War pilot crashes near a mythical island, he meets a race of warrior women who live there. Their princess leaves with him to help stop the war raging in the outside world, setting out on the path to becoming the legendary Wonder Woman.

programme.title: Movie: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: As government agents continue to track him down, Jason Bourne searches for his identity by going back to where his journey all began.

programme.title: Movie: Halloween
programme.desc: Fifteen years after killing his teenage sister on Halloween, Michael Myers escapes from a mental institution, days before Halloween, and returns home where he terrorizes a young girl and her friends.

programme.title: Movie: Halloween II
programme.desc: Following his Halloween night killing spree, Dr. Loomis races to locate serial killer Michael Myers before he finds his next victim. Meanwhile, Laurie Strode is hospitalized while Michael searches Haddonfield, close on her trail.

programme.title: Movie: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: An aspiring chef tries to win a food-truck competition, while her competitor tries to win her heart.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Vienna
programme.desc: A concert violinist who has lost her passion visits Vienna for Christmas. There she finds the inspiration she has been missing with an American diplomat and his children.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Mangiacavallo Curse Makes a Lousy Wedding Present
programme.desc: Sophia disrupts a wedding celebration by saying that she cursed the groom's grandfather.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All Bets Are Off
programme.desc: Dorothy risks everything when she lets her gambling problem get out of control.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: An FBI agent investigates the girls' lives for a possible visit from President Bush. This leads the girls to reminisce about times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: When the FBI agent announces that George Bush will make a visit to their home, the girls continue to reminisce and Dorothy quickly readies a list of points she wants to make to the president.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche Delivers
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter wants to give birth in a birthing center while Blanche is preoccupied by the possibility of Rebecca delivering in a local hospital. Blanche doesn't want to be embarrassed by the fact that her daughter was artificially inseminated.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Once in St. Olaf
programme.desc: Rose makes a stunning discovery while admitting a patient at the hospital. Meanwhile, Sophia has to have surgery, but a mix-up occurs after the operation and Sophia becomes lost in the hospital.

programme.title: Frasier: The 1000th Show
programme.desc: The station manager wants to throw a publicity rally to celebrate Frasier's 1000th show. This soon escalates into 'Frasier Crane Day,' leaving Niles very jealous. There is just one problem: Frasier can't seem to get there in time.

programme.title: Frasier: Voyage of the Damned
programme.desc: Roz gets an offer for a free cruise if Frasier agrees to make a celebrity appearance.

programme.title: Frasier: My Fair Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier has a relationship with a well-known attorney. All is well until his family point out that Frasier is playing out the role of the submissive female in the relationship.

programme.title: Frasier: Desperately Seeking Closure
programme.desc: Samantha dumps Frasier, who then becomes obsessed with finding out why she suddenly chose to end their relationship.

programme.title: Frasier: Perspectives on Christmas
programme.desc: Martin, Daphne, Niles and Roz recount their stories of a stressful Christmas period, including Martin being in a Christmas pageant, Daphne thinking Martin is dying and Frasier telling Roz's mother she is pregnant.

programme.title: Frasier: Where Every Bloke Knows Your Name
programme.desc: Frasier is bored with his regular routine so Daphne invites him to her British pub. Daphne quickly feels he is invading her turf and so a darts match is arranged to decide who gets to keep visiting the pub.

programme.title: Frasier: Ain't Nobody's Business If 'I Do'
programme.desc: Daphne finds an engagement ring in Martin's drawer, leading to the possibility of Sherry becoming Frasier and Niles' new mother. This revelation sends Frasier and Niles on a quest into Sherry's background.

programme.title: Frasier: The Zoo Story
programme.desc: When it's time to re-negotiate his contract at the station, Frasier decides to replace Bebe with a do-gooder, Ben. But Ben's idea of naming a crane at the zoo goes horribly awry, causing Frasier to question his ethics.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Zborn Again
programme.desc: Sophia tries once again to dissuade Dorothy from reconciling with her ex-husband Stan.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: How Do You Solve a Problem Like Sophia
programme.desc: Sophia decides to join a convent after her favourite nun, Sister Agnes, dies.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mrs. George Devereaux
programme.desc: Blanche has a dream in which she is visited by her deceased husband, George Devereaux.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun..Before They Die
programme.desc: Blanche tries to help Sophia seduce her date; Rose's relationship with Miles is affected.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stand by Your Man
programme.desc: Blanche meets a man at the library and only after they make a date does she realize he's in a wheelchair. Meanwhile, Rose wants to keep one of the puppies from Dreyfuss's litter despite Blanche's feelings.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide's Revenge
programme.desc: Dorothy must give the eulogy at her brother (a cross dresser), Phil's funeral. Meanwhile, a feud between Sophia and Phil's widow reaches a peak leading Sophia to reveal her hidden feelings about her son's alternative lifestyle.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Bloom Is Off the Rose
programme.desc: Rose wants more adventure in her relationship with Miles, so she signs them up for sky diving lessons. Meanwhile, Blanche's relationship with an abusive man causes Dorothy to speak her feelings.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sister of the Bride
programme.desc: Blanche's gay brother Clayton, makes a visit to Miami with a surprise, he has found the right person to make a commitment to, but Blanche still can't get over Clayton's sexual orientation.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Iceland
programme.desc: A woman gathers her college travel group together for a trip to Iceland. Her ex is part of this group and shows up uninvited, and shows her exactly what she is missing since their breakup.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Safari
programme.desc: When a woman inherits a wildlife reserve in South Africa, she travels there to meet with the head Ranger. Upon learning that the park is in financial jeopardy, and may have to be sold to her uncle's competitor, he urges her to take on a Safari.

programme.title: Movie: Mix Up in the Mediterranean
programme.desc: A small-town cook impersonates his estranged big city chef twin to compete in a culinary contest in Malta and falls for the woman in charge of the event, who thinks he is gay.

programme.title: Movie: Winter in Vail
programme.desc: A woman inherits a house in Vail, where she meets a man and gets a much-needed break.

programme.title: The Office: The Client
programme.desc: When Michael and Jan go after a new client, Michael surprises his boss in more ways than one. Meanwhile, Jim finds a screenplay written by Michael and the cubicle jockeys at Dunder Mifflin have a hilarious time acting it out.

programme.title: The Office: Performance Review
programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: The Office: E-Mail Surveillance
programme.desc: The employees at Dunder Mifflin are upset when Michael starts monitoring their emails. Meanwhile, Pam suspects Dwight and Angela are having an affair. Michael later shows up uninvited at Jim's barbecue and sings karaoke.

programme.title: The Office: Booze Cruise
programme.desc: When Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin crew on a motivational harbour cruise aboard a party boat on Lake Wallenpaupack, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig. Meanwhile, Jim is bummed when Roy and Pam finally set a wedding date.

programme.title: The Office: The Injury
programme.desc: Michael demands attention from the entire Dunder Mifflin office after he has a freak accident with his George Foreman grill and Dwight begins behaving strangely following a minor car crash.

programme.title: The Office: The Secret
programme.desc: Jim is worried that Michael is going to tell the others that he likes Pam so he has to unfortunately go along with being his best friend.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Job Interview
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira endeavour to secure an investor for a new motel, while Alexis and Ted struggle with long-distance.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Maid of Honour
programme.desc: Moira shares the newly released Crows movie trailer with the Jazzagals. Johnny and Roland find a suspicious bag of money at the new motel.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Premiere
programme.desc: Alexis plans a local premiere for the 'Crows' movie and Moira makes a big splash on the red carpet. David tends to Patrick after his wisdom teeth removal.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Wingman
programme.desc: Alexis and Moira deal with the outcome of a viral video, while Johnny helps Bob get back out in the dating world.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Moira Rosé
programme.desc: Moira and David sample wine at Herb Ertlinger's vineyard, while Johnny attempts to have 'the talk' with Patrick.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Presidential Suite
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira spend a night at the Presidential Suite in the new motel, while Alexis receives a surprise visitor.

programme.title: Doing the Most With Phoebe Robinson: Hasan Minhaj Does Parenting
programme.desc: Hasan Minhaj teaches Phoebe parenting basics like changing diapers and taking family portraits, and Michelle Buteau, Jamie Lee and Baron Vaughn weigh in on whether Phoebe should have kids.

programme.title: Doing the Most With Phoebe Robinson: Ashley Graham Does Rollerblading
programme.desc: Supermodel Ashley Graham teaches Phoebe the basics of rollerblading before the two take on a half-pipe.

programme.title: South Park: Fatbeard
programme.desc: Cartman's dream of living the life of a pirate will come true if he can just get to Somalia. When he doesn't find a crew of swashbucklers, he assumes command and leads the Somalian pirates to a glory of riches.

programme.title: South Park: Handicar
programme.desc: Timmy's successful new car service makes him a lot of enemies.

programme.title: South Park: Major Boobage
programme.desc: In a South Park homage to the 1981 film, 'Heavy Metal,' the boys are trying to get Kenny off the latest drug craze that's captured the junior high and under set.

programme.title: South Park: Prehistoric Ice Man
programme.desc: Kyle and Stan's friendship is strained after they discover a man frozen in an ice cave and have differing opinions about what is best for their 'discovery.'

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Stanley's Cup
programme.desc: Hitting rock bottom, Stan finds himself without a job, no bicycle and the only way out of his situation is to coach the peewee hockey team. Stan is about to find out that being a coach means facing his past, reliving a life he would rather leave behind.

programme.title: South Park: You're Not Yelping
programme.desc: Cartman considers himself the top online restaurant reviewer in South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Erection Day
programme.desc: The South Park Elementary School Talent Show is coming up and Jimmy can't wait to perform his comedy routine. But first he must find a way to gain control of his raging hormones.

programme.title: South Park: You Have 0 Friends
programme.desc: When Kyle begs Stan to 'friend' him, Stan gets sucked into the world of Facebook. Kyle gets a hard lesson about the politics of Facebook when he friends the least popular kid in school.

programme.title: South Park: A Boy and a Priest
programme.desc: A very special relationship has developed between Butters and the Parish Priest. When the town finds the church doors locked and no sign of the pair, they call in the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Galentine's Day
programme.desc: Leslie hears a story about her mom's old flame and tries to track him down for Valentine's Day. Andy and his band are nervous about playing a gig at the Senior Center.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Woman of the Year
programme.desc: Leslie is outraged when Ron wins the 'Woman of the Year' award for a project she started. Tom is desperate to find some money to invest in a local Pawnee club.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Possum
programme.desc: When a possum bites the mayor's dog on a golf course, Leslie is asked to form a task force to catch the pesky animal. Meanwhile, Ron is upset when Mark refuses to bend the rules for him.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Park Safety
programme.desc: After Jerry gets mugged by a bunch of kids, Leslie meets with the park rangers in hopes of improving park safety.

programme.title: The Office: The Carpet
programme.desc: When someone soils the carpet in Michael's office, Michael begins to question his popularity with his staff. He temporarily takes Jim's desk in the bullpen in order to bond with his troops, and initiates a sales contest to boost morale.

programme.title: The Office: Boys and Girls
programme.desc: When Jan visits the office to conduct a 'women in the workplace' seminar with the female Dunder Mifflin employees, Michael takes the guys down to the warehouse for some 'male bonding.'

programme.title: The Office: Dwight's Speech
programme.desc: Dunder Mifflin salesman of the year Dwight Schrute must somehow conquer his fear of public speaking before the big convention and turns for help to the worst possible teacher, Michael. As Pam becomes consumed in her wedding plans, Jim plans his escape.

programme.title: The Office: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Michael is surprised when he strikes up a friendship with the five-year-old daughter of his sworn enemy, Toby, on Take Your Daughter to Work Day.

programme.title: The Office: Michael's Birthday
programme.desc: In celebration of his birthday, Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin gang ice skating while Kevin nervously waits for some medical test results.

programme.title: The Office: Drug Testing
programme.desc: When Dwight finds half a joint in the parking lot, he launches a full investigation, prompting Michael to ask for an unusual favour. Elsewhere, Pam playfully issues a challenge to Jim and he does his best to follow through with it.

programme.title: The Office: Conflict Resolution
programme.desc: When Michael takes over conflict resolution duties from HR, chaos ensues at Dunder Mifflin.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: The Office: Gay Witch Hunt
programme.desc: When Michael unintentionally outs a gay employee, he stumbles through a sensitivity mine-field.

programme.title: The Office: The Convention
programme.desc: After meeting Jan in Philadelphia for the annual Northeastern Mid-Market Office Supply Convention, Michael enlists Dwight's help in organizing a party in his room for fellow conventioneers. Meanwhile, Ryan and Kelly join friends out on a double date.

programme.title: The Office: The Coup
programme.desc: After Jan busts Michael for telling the employees they can watch movies instead of working on Mondays, Angela pushes Dwight to make a play for Michael's job. In the meantime, Pam surfs the internet and Jim plays video games.

programme.title: The Office: Grief Counseling
programme.desc: After learning that his old boss, the former regional manager, has died, Michael attempts to guide the Dunder Mifflin staff through their grief as he searches for the right way to honour the company man.

programme.title: The Office: Initiation
programme.desc: New full-time employee Ryan anxiously accompanies Dwight on his first sales call, but is taken aback by the odd series of challenges Dunder Mifflin's top salesman puts him through along the way, including a side trip to the Schrute family beet farm.

programme.title: The Office: Diwali
programme.desc: Michael encourages the entire Scranton branch to support Kelly and attend a local celebration of Diwali, the Hindu Festival of Lights. As Ryan nervously faces Kelly's family at the event, Michael, his new girlfriend and the staff sample Indian cuisine.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Closing
programme.desc: When Jan tells Michael that the Scranton Branch will be shutting down, Michael strives to keep his staff's spirits up. Meanwhile, everyone privately begins to envision how their lives will change in the aftermath.

programme.title: Major Crimes: By Any Means
programme.desc: In the series finale, Lt. Tao is stuck in a room with a potential bomb. Provenza finally identifies the real Ms. Bechtal, and Major Crimes comes face-to-face for the very last time with Phillip Stroh.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Reloaded
programme.desc: There is little time for adjustment for the newly appointed head of Major Crimes, when the department is rushing to reach a plea regarding a string of grocery store robberies that turns fatal. Meanwhile, Raydor takes a big step to protect Rusty.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Before and After
programme.desc: The division works to obtain justice in a brutal homicide, but it turns out to be more complicated than expected. Raydor struggles to gain the respect of her colleagues and to keep supervising Rusty 24/7.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Medical Causes
programme.desc: The facts are blurry in a case involving a fatal car crash in a nightclub. Rusy has to face the harsh reality when Raydor tracks down his mother.

programme.title: Major Crimes: The Ecstasy and the Agony
programme.desc: A homicide case involves the Israeli mob and a self-proclaimed 'intuitive life strategist.' In a rare display of vulnerability, Provenza opens up to a suspect. Meanwhile, Rusty's first day of school doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Citizen's Arrest
programme.desc: In a case involving a kidnapping-turned-homicide, the squad is pressured to work quickly. Meanwhile, DNA evidence proves that Rusty has a close tie to the justice system.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Out of Bounds
programme.desc: When a fatal shooting occurs in gang territory, Capt. Raynor makes a bold move that could jeopardize her career. Rusty claims that he doesn't care to meet his biological father.
