programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Life in a Cage
programme.desc: VRC is at its limit when the amount of rescues and drop-offs rise. Lizzy and Toney travel to a remote part of the city to save a trio of orphaned dogs in a dire state, veteran tenant Lil Rocky faces a cancer scare, and a litter of puppies are welcomed.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Saved from the Fight
programme.desc: Tia is called in to help rescue five injured dogs from a dog fighting situation. Parolee Spencer gets out of jail and returns to Villalobos. Tia asks Spencer to help out with an adoption to keep him on the straight and narrow.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Down, Not Out
programme.desc: After Tia suffers a devastating injury, her kids have to step up to keep Villalobos running. Everyone's help is needed to catch an elusive dog in the middle of the night. And, a family of 8 needs a new companion to complete their active home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Life in a Cage
programme.desc: VRC is at its limit when the amount of rescues and drop-offs rise. Lizzy and Toney travel to a remote part of the city to save a trio of orphaned dogs in a dire state, veteran tenant Lil Rocky faces a cancer scare, and a litter of puppies are welcomed.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Helter Shelter
programme.desc: A friend in search of a fresh start arrives at Villalobos and finds himself in the middle of a contentious rescue involving a momma dog and her puppies. A former adopter wants to add another dog to the family, but a unique hurdle stands in the way.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Blind Hope
programme.desc: When a blind pit bull is attacked by other dogs, the Villalobos team steps-in and takes responsibility for his recovery. Also, a couple from Pittsburgh mourning the loss of their pit bull visits Villalobos and fall in love with one of Tia's favorite dogs.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Risky Business
programme.desc: A former volunteer return in hopes of adopting a dog she fell in love with but her boxer threatens her chances. A parolee risks his freedom when he goes down the wrong path after being released from prison.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Poachers and Liars
programme.desc: Warden Tommy Johnson pays a surprise visit to the home of a known poacher. Warden Mike Boone relocates an alligator snapping turtle.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Panhandle Poachers
programme.desc: Warden Marshall leads the charge on a poaching investigation. Warden Richards visits an allegedly illegal snake breeder. Wardens Gould and Hickerson try to save an injured pelican, while Warden Miller brings a caracara bird to rehab.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Midnight Manhunt
programme.desc: A badly injured tortoise needs an innovative procedure and an eagle's death is investigated. Out on the lake, wardens educate the public on staying safe. As night falls, a car crash turns into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bullets and Lies
programme.desc: A couple is suspected of killing a deer during off-season. Warden Iles transports orphaned baby armadillos for rehabilitation, and Warden Gould searches for a mountain lion that is lurking near a recreational park in Laredo.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sparks Flying
programme.desc: During the holiday weekend a jet skier is reported missing, while another is caught without a life vest. Warden Kiel witnesses a fist fight during the fireworks, and warden Cummings handles underage drinkers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Anglers, Alcohol and Owls
programme.desc: In Texas, a woman is found in distress on the side of the highway. Warden Hensz handles an aggressive family of owls, while Warden Bailey responds to a call about underage drinkers holding a fishing tournament.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Thrill of the Hunt
programme.desc: A tense confrontation ensues when Wardens Scott and Gould respond to a call about an illegal deer hunting case. A pair of raccoons find their way to a gas station and must be trapped, and Warden Boone handles a disgruntled hunter.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Treacherous Trails
programme.desc: During a busy winter weekend, Lt. Boudreau encounters kite skiers, an illegal fire sled and a vandalized bob-house. Officer Canfield searches for a deer with an arrow in its head. Then, Officers Demler and Towne head our on a mountain rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Last Days of Winter
programme.desc: The dive team assists at an event in Hampton Beach, while Officer Courtney patrols the area's clam flats. Officers Hannett and Holmes patrol snowmobile activity across the state. And Officer Demler helps a bobcat that's been injured by a porcupine.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Riverside Stakeout
programme.desc: Nature lovers show up for Discover Wild New Hampshire Day. Officers conduct an undercover surveillance. Officer McKee rescues a starving owl from the side of the road. Later on, Mount Monadnock, a perilous rescue of an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Raccoon Rescue
programme.desc: With the help of local police, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett remove campers found illegally occupying state property. An 8-year-old boy is found riding solo on an ATV, and Officer Crouse helps two raccoon cubs found on the road.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Family Fortune

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Vacation Dream Home
programme.desc: A busy family get the opportunity to buy their dream vacation home in Gulf Shores, Alabama after they win one million dollars in a Louisiana Powerball.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Spacious Win
programme.desc: A single mom won $3 million on the lottery and wants more space after sharing an apartment with her three growing girls. With four ladies to please, David Bromstad has his hands full finding a home with rooms for everyone and space to spread out.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Florida Dreaming
programme.desc: After winning $1 million on a Florida scratcher, a husband and wife realize their dream of owning a house and land in North Port, Florida. She wants a gourmet kitchen and resort pool and he wants a huge backyard to grow fruit trees.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Winner Winner Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: Patty won $1 million on a scratch-off and is beside herself with excitement to find the house of her dreams with the help of David Bromstad. Patty and her sister-in-law target the upmarket suburb of Spring Hill, Florida, for their search.

programme.desc: A Kansas City couple seeks a home in Nashville after winning the lottery.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Some Like It Hotter
programme.desc: After their retirement got a lot warmer with a $1-million New York scratcher win, a couple is following their best friends to Punta Gorda, Florida, where they hope to buy into a classy retirement village.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: South Shore Score
programme.desc: David helps his 14th set of Massachusetts winners find a home on Boston's South Shore. They've been living in a tiny apartment with their giant fur baby, but they hope to find a property with a huge yard where they can start a family.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Dreaming Big in Boston
programme.desc: A young Massachusetts couple with six kids was beginning to feel cramped in their water damaged two-bedroom house. After winning a million dollars on a quick pick, however, they're finally able to buy a home big enough for their huge family.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Virginia Beach Forever
programme.desc: After serving in the U.S. Air Force for six years, a couple decides to leave Arizona and find their dream home in the military-friendly town of Virginia Beach, Virginia. A life-changing $100,000 settlement is used for a down payment.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Killer Kellison

programme.title: The Day the Towers Fell
programme.desc: Hear the stories of eyewitnesses caught in the horror of the World Trade Center tragedy.

programme.title: 9/11: Escape From the Towers

programme.title: 102 Minutes That Changed America

programme.title: Movie: The White Cliffs of Dover

programme.desc: A tornado carries a young girl to a magical land where she encounters witches and magnificent wonders.

programme.title: Movie: Wuthering Heights

programme.title: Movie: The Year of Living Dangerously

programme.title: Movie: The Yearling
programme.desc: A lonely boy must make a difficult choice regarding the future of his pet deer.

programme.title: Movie: Z

programme.title: Movie: Mrs. Miniver

programme.desc: A nineteenth century Viennese Lieutenant conducts an affair with a sexy violinist.

programme.title: Movie: Dear Heart

programme.title: Movie: Oliver!
programme.desc: A runaway from an orphanage hooks up with a group of young pickpockets.

programme.title: Movie: Gigi

programme.title: Disney Channel Special: Disney Hall of Villains
Raven's Home: Don't Trust the G in Apartment 4B
programme.desc: Now that they are high school students, Booker and Nia feel they are too old for trick-or-treating. They instead convince Levi, Tess and Ramon to join them for a night of real scares and fun in 4B, the apartment that is suspected to be haunted.

programme.title: Jessie: The Whining

programme.desc: The Simpsons deliver holiday cheer in this Christmas-themed trilogy. Homer takes over the sermon and delivers his version of the birth of Christ. Grandpa reminisces about his daredevil days as a fighter pilot. The townspeople prepare for Christmas Day.

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild: Cheating Death

programme.title: Murder Calls: Last Call
programme.desc: A traumatized man calls 911 after seeing his friend shot and killed right before his eyes. With a surprisingly long list of suspects, investigators must sort through layers of lies, jealousy, and mistrust, until they finally uncover the shooter.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Killer Confession
programme.desc: When Lea Porter goes missing in Prison Valley her family turn detective to try and find her. Their investigation leads to a shocking discovery - the killer's true identity. As the killer evades arrest, Lea's brother devises a plan to make him confess.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Bloodshed in the Bayou
programme.desc: After a mother is brutally slain in her home, police collect bizarre evidence they hope will lead to a murderer. When a second body turns up, this Louisiana community fears a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Highway of Horrors
programme.desc: In 1992, a college student disappears after her car breaks down on the highway. Family and friends join police in a frantic search that hits one setback after another. It may take new advances in DNA technology to finally crack this stubborn case.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Jenner Beach Murders
programme.desc: A Christian couple's weekend getaway takes a tragic turn when they are found murdered on a northern California beach. Satanic imagery found nearby leads local Sheriff's deputies on a manhunt complicated by a cagey killer who covered his tracks.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Flight Risk
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving Day 2018, in the mountains of Colorado a young pilot goes missing without a trace, leaving behind her baby. Police follow the few clues they have and unravel a story far more bizarre and horrifying than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Backyard Blood
programme.desc: A man's dream comes true when he buys his parents' house and moves his family into it, only to discover that his neighbor on the other side of the fence holds a decades-long grudge against him that won't resolve until one of them lies dead.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Killing in Chinatown
programme.desc: Art imitates life when Cambodian genocide survivor Dr. Haing Ngor wins an Oscar for his role in the film The Killing Fields. But when he's gunned down the LAPD investigate a web of political intrigue, revenge and street gangs to uncover the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Burned Alive
programme.desc: On a back road in Mississippi, a popular 19-year-old girl is set on fire and left to burn alive. Her last words lead detectives down a road of dead ends and the case goes cold until a special agent taps into her location data and finds a suspect.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Monkey in the Middle
programme.desc: A man finds himself living between hostile neighbors on both sides, including a former marine with severe PTSD. Their campaign of intimidation ramps up to the point of no return, ending with a deadly confrontation on the street outside their homes.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Monster in the Desert
programme.desc: In 1992, a 19-year-old woman is brutally assaulted outside of Desert Hot Springs, California. Miraculously she escapes, but lives in constant fear that he will find her again one day. What the victim doesn't realize is she survived a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide City: Main Line Massacre
programme.desc: When Philadelphia Mainliners Courtlandt and Alexandra Gross are found murdered in their home, detectives begin the hunt for a calculated killer which takes them from one of the wealthiest zip codes in the country straight into the heart of Philly.

programme.title: Homicide City: Killer Moves
programme.desc: When beloved a DJ, Alberto Martino, is found bludgeoned to death outside his radio station, it's appears to be a robbery gone wrong. But police quickly learn the Martino was not a random victim, but the focus of a carefully orchestrated homicide.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Alley of Death
programme.desc: When 14-year old Gloria Pointer is found raped and murdered in an alleyway, it is the start of a thirty-year quest for answers by her mother who will not give up until she finds justice for her daughter.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: On Holy Saturday morning, one day before Sister Margaret Ann Pahl's 72nd birthday, she is viciously murdered in the chapel where she works. Police mount an investigation that will unearth the shocking lies and sadistic secrets leading to her death.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Set Me Free
programme.desc: When Detectives looking for missing Mom, Tami Reay find blood in her car they arrest her husband, Brad. But then they receive a tip off, pointing the finger at an entirely new suspect.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Killer on the Roof
programme.desc: A former marine is gunned down in bed, and detectives believe the shots were fired from the roof outside his second-story window. When the investigators' focus turns to the victim's workplace, furious colleagues and scorned exes litter the suspect list.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bloodland
programme.desc: A young family buys a rural piece of paradise. Still, the gate on their land that prevents neighbours from accessing their property soon becomes an angry, ultimately fatal, bone of contention.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Best Lives Cut Short
programme.desc: When entrepreneur Ash Rowell's good life is cut short after he's gunned down, police suspect a hit. Suspicion falls on his own family members. Then, after a long night of partying, two friends' overdoses may turn out to be something more sinister.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Quickly, I'm Afraid
programme.desc: In Danville, Kentucky, a pawn store robbery leaves three people dead. Detectives struggle to identify the suspect, their only lead is a mysterious silver van. Using a trail of video to pursue the elusive vehicle is their only hope of catching a killer.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Unhinged
programme.desc: Three college students believe it's their calling to rid Portland of 'its sinners,' committing 'overkill' murders to make their point.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: A Body at Devil's Corral
programme.desc: When police officer Rob and former beauty queen Joanna reunite years after high school, he seems to be her Prince Charming. But money troubles and infidelities bring this fairytale to a tragic end when one of them is found dead at Devil's Corral.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Opposites Can Kill
programme.desc: Young single mom Kathy wants a good life for herself and her son. That life soon includes wannabe rap star Juan, who has ambitions of his own. But their dreams clash and tempers erupt when Kathy decides she wants more out of life: no matter what the cost.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Pressure Point
programme.desc: A Virginia Beach massage therapist disappears before work, sparking an intense but fruitless search. Weeks later, a cyclist discovers trash bags in a swamp, the contents of which will rock the town and forever change the lives of Brianna's loved ones.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Massino
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. By the early 2000's, evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of longtime Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Alan Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vincent Gigante
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Mob Cops

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Air Aces: Red Tails
programme.desc: Pressure from African-American activist groups pushed President Roosevelt to initiate a Blacks-only fighter pilot training program during WWII.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The crew takes on the challenge of bringing the jungle to life in a suburban backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Living Under the Sea
programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' it in Rocket City
programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Zen and the Art of Pools
programme.desc: Lucas takes his art of backyard transformations to Parrish, FL, where a couple requests the ultimate space of tranquility and relaxation.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Waterpark Wonderland
programme.desc: Pool genius Lucas transforms a neglected backyard into a waterpark wonderland. With his most extreme remodel yet, Lucas creates a family fun zone, complete with waterslide and double decker outdoor party space. But it's not all fun 'n games.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Fiesta de Laguna
programme.desc: It's fiesta time as pool designer Lucas Congdon and his crew are challenged to create a Mexican resort in a Venice, Florida residential backyard. Lucas encounters several design 'firsts' on his journey to infuse the flavors of Mexico into his creation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Renovation in South Florida
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach home to renovate on a budget in South Florida.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Destined for a Renovation in Destin, Florida
programme.desc: Carrie and Lee have been splitting their time between Nashville and Destin, Florida but they want to get their two sons out of the city and into the sunshine - permanently.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Supersizing in St. Petersburg, Florida
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple loves their Florida lifestyle and desires to be on the water in St. Petersburg, which means they must take on a renovation project.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Bird In The Pan: The Reload

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: True Brew: The Reload

programme.desc: Ali Kahn digs into the best deals in Grand Rapids with a twilight French toast glistening with creamy anglaise sauce. For lunch, it's a Mexican fiesta with layers of juicy pork torta de jamon.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Full Throttle Yum

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Greenville Goodness
programme.desc: Ali Khan has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Greenville, S.C.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Filling Up In Florida

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Hungry In The Jax

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Deep-Fried Frenzy
programme.desc: Nothing's better than a little batter and hot oil. Eddie Jackson tracks down the crunchiest, most-delectable deep-fried foods that will put any food lover in a total frenzy.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Southern Staples
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson knows that you just can't beat authentic Southern cooking. Whether it's hearty and savory breakfasts, traditional and delicious low-country cuisine or sweet desserts, it’s a full day of your favorite Southern staples.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Bay Area
programme.desc: San Francisco proves that barbeque is not strictly southern, with the pork bun at Yank Sing.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Big Cheese

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Seattle

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mexican Favorites
programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Denver

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Las Vegas

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puglia

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Fez
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Fez, the cultural and spiritual capital of Morocco.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Delhi
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Delhi, India's capital and home to roughly 24 million people.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Porto

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Showdown
programme.desc: As the Turtles make a desperate assault on TCRI to shut down an alien portal, they find themselves engaging in the most difficult battle yet.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Showdown
programme.desc: As the Turtles make a desperate assault on TCRI to shut down an alien portal, they find themselves engaging in the most difficult battle yet.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Stego Search
programme.desc: The Warden takes away Javi’s keytar, putting him in a bad mood, which he refuses to explain to the team. Javi is forced to open up about his problems in order to find his Zord.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Mutation Situation
programme.desc: When Shredder teams with the Kraang to receive a batch of mutagen, the Turtles' problems only get worse - even putting their friendship with April at stake.

programme.title: Drama Club: S.A.D.
programme.desc: Darcy is excited to go to the school dance this year, but Mack is determined to avoid it at all costs after an embarrassing incident at the last one.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Imaginary Friend
programme.desc: Young Dylan arrives at his relatives' home needing a place to live, but his streetwise swagger upends the conservative Wilson household.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Speechless
programme.desc: The kids help Myles plan Yasmine's big dinner at the house for her boss. While Myles struggles to write a speech in honor of his wife, the kids throw out the catered food and plan their own menu.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Clone Babies/ Flying Spiders
programme.desc: Feeling that being Captain Man is too much work for just one person, Ray and Schwoz hatch the perfect plan: clone Ray.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Mad Wax/ Fails
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger are attacked by wax figures at the Celebrity Wax Museum. And, Brad posts embarrassing videos of Captain Man and Kid Dangers until they turn him invisible again.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Stuck in Two Holes
programme.desc: When Captain Man and Kid Danger are each stuck in a hole, Charlotte and Jasper must help.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Space Invaders
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger find out that an astronaut from Swellview has been taken hostage aboard the Space Station.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Space Invaders, Part 2
programme.desc: On the Space Station Captain Man and Kid Danger discover a little girl is the one who has taken the astronauts hostage. After realizing the astronauts are doing experiments on bunnies, Captain Man and Kid Danger decide to help her.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Saturday Night Lies
programme.desc: When Ray runs into an ex-girlfriend, he tries to impress her by pretending that Henry, Charlotte, and Jasper are his children.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Up the Stairs
programme.desc: Henry and Ray's friendship is put to the ultimate test when they have to make the half mile trek up the Man Cave stairs in order to make a surprise meal by a celebrity chef in Junk-N-Stuff.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Captain Man-kini
programme.desc: When a new internet celebrity is causing havoc in Swellview, Captain Man has to body swap with Frankini to infiltrate his secret lair.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Flabber Gassed
programme.desc: After acting too confident before a fight, Kid Danger and Captain Man are sprayed with Flabber Gas, making them powerless to defeat a new villain in Swellview. Schwoz puts our heroes in Exo-Suits which Charlotte and Jasper control.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Whistlin' Susie
programme.desc: After activating an atomic bomb in the 'Man Cave,' Ray and Henry decide to drive it out into the Swellview desert in order to save the city that they protect.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out to Launch
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rocket ship to get a better look and their mom and dad's star.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Boyfriend From 27,000 B.C./ Voyage to the Bottom of Buford
programme.desc: Boys go on an archaeological dig and find a real caveman; he falls in love with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: No More Bunny Business/ Spa Day
programme.desc: Candace adopts a bunny that is really a rogue secret agent looking for Agent P. Then, Candace and Stacy's plans for a spa day inspire Phineas and Ferb.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Trickening!
programme.desc: The kids forego their usual trick-or-treat path and instead take on the most haunted house in Duckburg.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Double-O-Duck in You Only Crash Twice!
programme.desc: A spy video game turns dangerously real as Launchpad and Dewey must stop F.O.W.L. agent Steelbeak’s plan to destroy Duckburg.

programme.title: The Owl House: Enchanting Grom Fright
programme.desc: Luz experiences Grom, Hexside's version of prom, and it's not what she expects.

programme.title: The Owl House: Wing It Like Witches
programme.desc: Not your average underdog story.

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: The Owl House: Young Blood, Old Souls
programme.desc: Luz's skills as a witch are put to the test when she attempts the impossible.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War!
programme.desc: Magica De Spell is close to exacting revenge on Scrooge, so the family races against time to plan a dangerous rescue mission to save Scrooge and the city.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Phantom and the Sorceress!
programme.desc: When a mysterious magic thief arrives in Duckburg, Lena must confront her past and team with her treacherous aunt, Magica.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Life and Crimes of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Scrooge’s enemies reveal a secret history to prove that Scrooge is responsible for turning them evil, forcing Louie to defend his uncle against their prosecutor: Doofus Drake.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Trading Chips / Mini Noodle Burger Max
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Hero Battle / Go Go the Wooweroo
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: DuckTales: Woo-oo!
programme.desc: Donald Duck takes Huey, Dewey and Louie to reclusive Scrooge McDuck's mansion where they uncover family secrets and stir up more adventure than they bargained for.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape To/ From Atlantis
programme.desc: Dewey's attempts to impress Scrooge on a trip to the Lost City of Atlantis leads to trouble. Donald tries to protect the boys from his new employer who is trying to destroy them.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Rise to Victory! Triumph Dragon!
Phineas and Ferb: Love at First Byte/ One Good Turn
programme.desc: Mom asks for help and Candace and Stacy compete in Ultimate Obstacle Course.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Dude, We're Getting the Band Back Together!
programme.desc: The kids put on a concert in the backyard featuring their parents' favourite old band when Dad forgets his anniversary with Mom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thaddeus and Thor/ De Plane! De Plane!
programme.desc: Candace, Phineas and Ferb compete with their look-alikes; Candace goes to a party.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Leo vs. Evil
programme.desc: Leo follows Marcus to his secret lair to gather evidence that proves he’s bionic but ends up captured by Marcus.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Showdown
programme.desc: With Douglas now revealed as Marcus' master, the two infiltrate Davenport's lab and capture Davenport with plans on using him to lure Bree, Chase, and Adam.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Showdown
programme.desc: Now alone, except for Eddy, Leo must figure out how to rescue Davenport and the Lab Rats. Eddy shares with Leo Davenport's secret room in the lab where all of his most powerful inventions are stored.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Night Drivers/ Return to Wartwood
programme.desc: Ignoring Anne's and Hop Pop's warnings about the dangers of night driving, Sprig and Polly stay up all night to drive the family home. Then, The Plantar's come up with a plan after learning they forgot to bring gifts.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.desc: Max and Caroline must prove their cleaning skills to Sophie in order to be hired as maids for her cleaning business.

programme.title: Black-ish: Waltz in a Minor
programme.desc: Dre's teenage cousin Kyra needs a place to stay and the Johnsons decide to take her in, but they have different approaches to helping her adjust to suburban life. Meanwhile, Jack and Diane try to vet Kyra on social media to get information on her.

programme.title: World's Funniest Animals: Spring Fling

programme.desc: Jerry demands that Kramer return the spare key to his apartment when he is over too often.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick's a Riot

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Chum System
programme.desc: A nightstick thought to have belonged to Ulysses S. Grant arrives at the shop. Then, Corey and Chum check out a vintage skateboard sticker collection. Chumlee tries to prove he is a master at multitasking.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Crude and Uncalled For
programme.desc: After Alan ends up in jail after getting into a bar fight, Charlie worries that Chelsea has a thing for the lawyer hired to help Alan.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Aye, Aye Captain Douche
programme.desc: Charlie's jealousy threatens his relationship with Chelsea.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chummified
programme.desc: A mummified falcon and an autographed Harlem Globetrotter's basketball from 1978 arrive at the shop. The Old Man and Chumlee borrow a metal detector that came in overnight to go treasure hunting, against Rick's wishes.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Joke
programme.desc: Ross and Chandler bicker over a joke that Ross successfully submitted to Playboy.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Fake Party
programme.desc: Rachel insists on throwing a farewell party for Emily just so she can invite Joshua.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Free Porn
programme.desc: Chandler and Joey get the adult channel for free and are afraid to turn off the TV.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's New Dress
programme.desc: Rachel prepares for an evening with Joshua, but plans go awry; Emily plays tour guide.

programme.title: Friends: The One With All the Haste
programme.desc: Ross considers asking Emily to move in with him to keep her from returning to London.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Fart Jokes, Pie and Celeste
programme.desc: Jake writes love songs to woo his ex-girlfriend and Herb and Alan hide their secret friendship from Judith's watchful eye.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Yay, No Polyps
programme.desc: Charlie endures a colonscopy to get out of a trip to see Chelsea's bigoted parents, only to return home and find them in his living room.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Wish We Had Better News
programme.desc: A TV reporter breaks wind on live television, a skier decides to hit the ski lodge, at 30mph, and later, a man accidentally parks his motorcycle in deep end of the pool.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: It Just Goes to Snow Ya
programme.desc: A weather reporter catches a winter bug by inhaling a fly, a guy shoveling snow off a roof discovers the meaning of slippery slope, and a woman wakes up to a foot and a half of snow inside her car.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior: Seattle/ Tacoma City Finals
programme.desc: 'American Ninja Warrior' heads back to the Pacific North West for the City Finals round of the competition at the Tacoma Dome.

programme.title: Wipeout: Winter Wipeout: Some People Just Don't Know When to Quit
programme.desc: Featuring 'Snowman Surprise,' including 'Booty Pop' who butts in on the Yule Log Jam and a dolphin impressionist who chatters on about the Big Balls, all while a 'Studly Student' and 'Pretty Piggy' run for their lives on the 'Polar Bear Express.'
